requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality for Belgium
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC、无线模块及电能质量（比利时）
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC、無線模組及電能質量（比利時）

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Belgium should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, fleet operator, public-sector project, or Fluvius/ORES/RESA/Elia-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under EU RED 2014/53/EU and project or Belgian national requirements. Fluvius (Flanders) has specific requirements for smart-charging interfaces enabling demand-response integration with the distribution network.
summary.zh: 在比利时，若充电点运营商、车队运营方、公共部门项目或Fluvius/ORES/RESA/Elia相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU及IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据欧盟无线设备指令2014/53/EU及比利时国家要求触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。Fluvius（弗兰德）对支持与配电网需求响应集成的智能充电接口有具体要求。
summary.zht: 在比利時，若充電點運營商、車隊運營方、公共部門項目或Fluvius/ORES/RESA/Elia相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU及IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據歐盟無線設備指令2014/53/EU及比利時國家要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。Fluvius（法蘭德斯）對支持與配電網需求響應集成的智能充電接口有具體要求。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
EU Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU (where wireless modules are present)
Belgian Institute for Postal Services and Telecommunications (BIPT/IBPT) — spectrum and radio module approval requirements for Belgium
Fluvius smart-charging interoperability requirements for demand response (Flanders/Brussels)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Belgian operators, OCPP, EU payment systems, local language (Dutch/French), currency (EUR), and data interfaces. Radio modules included in Chinese chargers for the Chinese market may hold Chinese MIIT type-approval which is not recognised in Belgium; re-approval under BIPT/IBPT or RED conformity assessment is required.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为比利时运营商、OCPP、欧盟支付系统、本地语言（荷语/法语）、货币（欧元）和数据接口重新配置。中国市场充电桩中包含的无线模块可能持有中国工信部型式核准，该认证在比利时不被认可；须根据BIPT/IBPT的要求重新办理型式核准或依据无线设备指令完成合格评定。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為比利時運營商、OCPP、歐盟支付系統、本地語言（荷語/法語）、貨幣（歐元）和數據接口重新配置。中國市場充電樁中包含的無線模組可能持有中國工信部型式核准，該認證在比利時不被認可；須根據BIPT/IBPT的要求重新辦理型式核准或依據無線設備指令完成合格評定。

standards_or_laws: Chinese MIIT radio module approvals (not recognised in Belgium — RED conformity or BIPT/IBPT re-approval required)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path (BIPT/IBPT for Belgian spectrum/radio type-approval, or RED conformity), and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Belgian configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific Belgian DSO supply point constraints. User interface and documentation must address Dutch and/or French language requirements for Belgium. Fluvius smart-charging API or interoperability requirements may impose additional software integration work for Flanders/Brussels deployments.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终比利时配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径（比利时频谱/无线型式核准须经BIPT/IBPT，或依据无线设备指令完成合格评定），以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体比利时配电运营商供电点约束进行审查。用户界面和文件须满足比利时荷语和/或法语要求。弗兰德/布鲁塞尔部署还可能因Fluvius智能充电API或互操作性要求而需要额外的软件集成工作。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終比利時配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑（比利時頻譜/無線型式核准須經BIPT/IBPT，或依據無線設備指令完成合格評定），以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體比利時配電運營商供電點約束進行審查。用戶界面和文件須滿足比利時荷語和/或法語要求。法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾部署還可能因Fluvius智能充電API或互操作性要求而需要額外的軟件集成工作。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, commercial fleet, or utility-linked chargers in Belgium; EMC and power-quality evidence is required under EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU; radio module conformity is required under EU RED 2014/53/EU; BIPT/IBPT spectrum approval applies to radio transmitters placed on the Belgian market; Fluvius smart-charging interoperability may be required for Flanders/Brussels grid-integrated deployments
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence; Chinese MIIT radio module approvals are not recognised in Belgium

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Belgian networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, EU EMC Directive and IEC 61000 EMC and power quality compliance, EU RED conformity for wireless modules, BIPT/IBPT radio module approval where applicable, Dutch and/or French user interface and documentation, and Fluvius smart-charging interoperability for Flanders/Brussels deployments. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 比利时联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、欧盟电磁兼容指令及IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量合规、无线模块欧盟无线设备指令合规、适用时的BIPT/IBPT无线模块核准、荷语和/或法语用户界面及文件，以及弗兰德/布鲁塞尔部署的Fluvius智能充电互操作性。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 比利時聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、歐盟電磁相容指令及IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質合規、無線模組歐盟無線設備指令合規、適用時的BIPT/IBPT無線模組核准、荷語和/或法語用戶界面及文件，以及法蘭德斯/布魯塞爾部署的Fluvius智能充電互操作性。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。
